name: OpenWiki Post-Rename Smoke
prompt: Use the OpenWiki Docs plugin loaded from github:rajshah4/openhands-openwiki on the cloned rajshah4/openwiki-demo-target repository. Run /openwiki-docs:init if openwiki/quickstart.md is missing; otherwise run /openwiki-docs:update. If OpenWiki documentation changed, create a branch named openwiki/postrename-smoke, commit only openwiki/** plus top-level AGENTS.md or CLAUDE.md changes, and open a pull request titled "docs: OpenWiki post-rename smoke test". If no docs changes are needed, do not create a commit or PR. Finish with a concise summary of changed docs, evidence inspected, caveats, and PR status.
